signal_evidence: Between 2022-10-07 and 2022-10-07, the customer conducted 1 transaction(s) — predominantly cash withdrawals — amounting to approximately NPR 21,807.
Of these, 1 were cross-border, routed to counterparties outside the customer's usual corridor.

noise_evidence: During the branch's periodic transaction-monitoring review, the compliance desk at ADBL examined the account held by Sally Dominguez after an internal threshold alert was triggered.
This report is submitted out of an abundance of caution for the compliance unit's further analysis and does not, by itself, constitute a determination of wrongdoing.
